titleStmt.title: SII 38.20: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 20. (A.R. No. 20 of 1912.) TEṞKUKARAŚERI, SRIVAIKUNTAM TALUK, TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT. On the west wall, central shrine, Kulaśēkharanātha temple.

p.hi: King: Māṟavarmaṉ alias Tribhuvanachakaravartti Kulaśēkharadēva Year 14: 1282 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription records the gift of land along with the taxes for conducting services on the occasion of tiru-ppaḷḷi-eḻuchi and for providing food offerings (amudhu-paḍi) to the god, Kulaśēkharaīśvaram-uḍaiyanāyanār by the ūrār of Pāṇḍyanallūr in Amudaguṇa-vaḷanāḍu. The record also mentions the stipulation of one uḻakku of rice towards (the ceremony) Sandāna-sāpam. Three temple personnel Ulagyyavanda-Pāṇḍyan Bhaṭṭaṉ, Rāsiṅga Bhaṭṭaṉ and Vāṇarāya Bhaṭṭaṉ figure as the signatories and they undertook to burn the lamp and made provisions for the same.
The mention of Karunāṭṭaraśar (King of Karṇāṭa) in delineating the boundaries is probably a reference to the Hoysalas who must have exerted influence in the politics of this period.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . śrī komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulacekaratevaṟku varuṣam 4 vatu paṅkūṉiRead ‘paṅkuṉi’mātam Amutakuṇavaḷanāṭṭuk kāraiceri yyavantapāṇṭinallūr Ūrārku Icainta Ūrom U
ṭaiyār kulacekariśvaramuṭaiya nāyiṉār koyilil Āticaṇṭeśvarap piḷḷaiyāṟku dharmadāṉa pramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭutta Inta nāyiṉārkku tirupaḷḷieḻuccikku Amutupaṭi Uḷḷiṭṭa
veṉjaṉattukku Uṭaṟkoḷpaṭikku Iṭṭa candrādityavaṟ celvatāka naṉcenilattukku kiḻellai kaṉṉāṭṭaraiyar tiruttu t teṉṉellai kāḻiñāṉacampantar Uḻutavayalukku
vaṭakkum melellai nāyiṉār tirunāḷpaṭikku kiḻakkum vaṭavellai tirunāḷpaṭikku teṟkum In nāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nilam Araimāvum meṟpaṭi nilam Araimāvukku kellai kiḻellai
kaḷirukku meṟkum teṉṉellai karunāṭṭaracar tiruttukku vaṭakkum melellai paṉaivaṭalikku kiḻakkum vaṭavellai cetarāyar tiruttukku teṟkum Ākanilam Orumā vum piḷḷaiyār Āyam I
yvūṟ paṟṟil muṉṟu vaḻiyilum varum cāṭṭukku 1 kha potikku 1mā talaiccumaikku Uḻakkum Immutalum Innilattukkuḷ kaṭamaiyuṅkoṇṭu Immutalkoṇṭu Innāyiṉāṟku tiruppaḷḷiye
ḻucci Amutupaṭikku Āticaṇṭecurappiḷḷaiyāṟku kallilum cempilum veṭṭik kuṭuttom Ūrār Icainta Ūrom Ūrāṟku camaiñcu kāraicerimuventarveḷāṉ Eḻuttu § Immutal koṇṭu Ikko
yil tāṉattārom nāḷoṉṟukku 3 Uḻavariciyum Oru tiruviḷakkum Iṭṭu tiruppaḷḷieḻucci Amutu ceyvippoṉamaikku Ivai Ulakuyyavanta pāṉṭiyaRead ‘pāṇṭiya’paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Irāciṅkapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu vā
ṇarāya paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivvūṟku colli Ittiruppaḷḷi Eḻucci kaṭaikkoṭṭiṉapaṭṭaṉuṭaiyāṉāṉa Ulakuyyavantapāṇṭiya cakkiravattikku nāḷ Oṉṟukku Uḻakkaricic cella cantāṉaccāpamāka IṭṭuperIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 38.20 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
